command: molecule-ranker discover --disease "Synthetic V3 certification condition" --mode mocked --output-dir "$OUTPUT_DIR" --json
what_output_does_not_prove: No clinical validity, binding, activity, safety, efficacy, or biomedical outcome is proven.
No protocol, synthesis instruction, or dosing guidance is provided.
what_output_means: The V3 result bundle can be certified as a platform/workflow artifact.
Certification failure would block V3 success status.
